channel.title: GitHub Apex Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Apex in GitHub

item.title: alexed1/LightningFlowComponents
item.description: A collection of unofficial Flow extensions that can be used to enhance Salesforce Flow and Orchestrator.

item.title: SFDO-Community/declarative-lookup-rollup-summaries
item.description: Declarative Lookup Rollup Summaries (DLRS) is a community built and maintained Salesforce application that allows you to create cross object roll-ups declaratively - no code! For install instructions and documentation, visit our website https://sfdo-community-sprints.github.io/DLRS-Documentation/

item.title: certinia/apex-mdapi
item.description: Apex Wrapper for the Salesforce Metadata API
